## Overview
### Introduction to Google: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview Custom Tools
The Google: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview Custom Tools is a cutting-edge language model developed by Google, released on 2024-01-01. This model is classified as a standard tier and is not open source. The architecture of Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview Custom Tools is designed to handle a wide range of tasks, including text generation, coding, analysis, and summarization. With a context window of 1,048,576 tokens and a maximum output of 65,536 tokens, this model is capable of processing large amounts of data.

### Strengths and Use Cases
The main strengths of Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview Custom Tools lie in its capabilities, which include text, function calling, JSON mode, streaming, and structured outputs. This model is best suited for applications such as chat, text generation, coding, analysis, RAG pipelines, and summarization. The pricing model for this service is based on input and output tokens, with costs of $2.0 per 1M input tokens and $12.0 per 1M output tokens. The model's performance is benchmarked with an MMLU score of 80.0 and an LMSYS Arena ELO score of 1200, demonstrating its capabilities in various tasks. With its robust architecture and capabilities, Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview Custom Tools is a powerful tool for developers.

### Pricing and Cost Examples
The pricing for Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview Custom Tools is based on the number of tokens processed. The cost examples provided show that 1,000 calls with an average of 500 tokens cost $0.007, while 10,000 calls cost $0.07, and 100,000 calls cost $0.7000000000000001. This pricing model allows developers to estimate the costs of using the model for their applications. With no direct competitors listed,

| Output | $12.0 |
| Cached Input | $None |
| Batch Input | $None |
| Batch Output | $None |
